diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -19,8 +19,8 @@
             self.edge_index, self.edge_weights = self._convert_adj_to_edges(adj_matrix)

         else:

             # Placeholder - will be updated later

-            self.edge_index = torch.tensor([[0], [0]], dtype=torch.long)

-            self.edge_weights = torch.tensor([0.0], dtype=torch.float)

+            self.register_buffer('edge_index', torch.tensor([[0], [0]], dtype=torch.long))

+            self.register_buffer('edge_weights', torch.tensor([0.0], dtype=torch.float))

         

         # Spatial GCN layers

         self.gcn1 = GCNConv(input_dim, hidden_dim)

@@ -47,51 +47,50 @@
     

     def set_edge_index_and_weights(self, adj_matrix):

         # Convert adjacency matrix to edge index format

-        self.edge_index, self.edge_weights = self._convert_adj_to_edges(adj_matrix)

+        edge_index, edge_weights = self._convert_adj_to_edges(adj_matrix)

+        self.register_buffer('edge_index', edge_index)

+        self.register_buffer('edge_weights', edge_weights)

         

     def forward(self, x):

-        # x shape: (batch_size, seq_len, num_nodes)

-        batch_size, seq_len, num_nodes = x.shape

+        # x shape: (batch_size, input_seq_len, num_nodes)

+        batch_size, input_seq_len, num_nodes = x.shape

         

-        # Move edge_index and edge_weights to the same device as x

-        device = x.device

-        edge_index = self.edge_index.to(device)

-        edge_weights = self.edge_weights.to(device)

+        # Transpose to (batch_size, num_nodes, input_seq_len) for spatial processing

+        x = x.transpose(1, 2)  # Shape: (batch_size, num_nodes, input_seq_len)

         

-        # Transpose to (batch_size, num_nodes, seq_len) for spatial processing

-        x = x.transpose(1, 2)  # Shape: (batch_size, num_nodes, seq_len)

+        # Process each node with its input sequence through GCN layers

+        # First, reshape to combine batch and node dimensions

+        x = x.contiguous().view(-1, input_seq_len)  # Shape: (batch_size * num_nodes, input_seq_len)

         

-        # Reshape to (batch_size * num_nodes, seq_len) for GCN processing

-        x = x.contiguous().view(-1, seq_len)  # Shape: (batch_size * num_nodes, seq_len)

+        # Expand to match hidden dimension

+        x_expanded = x.unsqueeze(-1).expand(-1, -1, self.hidden_dim // input_seq_len + 1)

+        x_expanded = x_expanded.reshape(x.size(0), self.hidden_dim)

         

-        # Apply first GCN layer

-        # Need to expand x to have the right number of features for GCN

-        x_expanded = x.unsqueeze(-1).expand(-1, -1, self.hidden_dim // seq_len + 1)

-        x_expanded = x_expanded.reshape(-1, self.hidden_dim)

-        

-        x_gcn = self.gcn1(x_expanded, edge_index, edge_weights)

+        # Apply first GCN layer - this applies the transformation to each node

+        x_gcn = self.gcn1(x_expanded, self.edge_index, self.edge_weights)

         x_gcn = F.relu(x_gcn)

         

         # Apply second GCN layer

-        x_gcn = self.gcn2(x_gcn, edge_index, edge_weights)

+        x_gcn = self.gcn2(x_gcn, self.edge_index, self.edge_weights)

         x_gcn = F.relu(x_gcn)  # Shape: (batch_size * num_nodes, hidden_dim)

         

         # Reshape back to (batch_size, num_nodes, hidden_dim)

         x_gcn = x_gcn.view(batch_size, num_nodes, self.hidden_dim)

         

-        # Transpose to (batch_size, hidden_dim, num_nodes) to prepare for LSTM

-        x_gcn = x_gcn.transpose(1, 2)  # Shape: (batch_size, hidden_dim, num_nodes)

+        # Now apply LSTM to capture temporal dependencies

+        # Transpose to (batch_size, num_nodes, hidden_dim) -> (batch_size, hidden_dim, num_nodes)

+        x_temporal = x_gcn.transpose(1, 2)  # Shape: (batch_size, hidden_dim, num_nodes)

         

-        # Transpose to apply LSTM along the nodes dimension

-        x_lstm_input = x_gcn.transpose(1, 2)  # Shape: (batch_size, num_nodes, hidden_dim)

+        # Transpose to (batch_size, num_nodes, hidden_dim) so LSTM operates on nodes dimension

+        x_lstm_input = x_temporal.transpose(1, 2)  # Shape: (batch_size, num_nodes, hidden_dim)

         

-        # Apply LSTM

+        # Apply LSTM - this captures temporal patterns across nodes

         lstm_out, _ = self.lstm(x_lstm_input)  # Shape: (batch_size, num_nodes, hidden_dim)

         

-        # Project to output dimension

+        # Project to output dimension (sequence length)

         output = self.output_proj(lstm_out)  # Shape: (batch_size, num_nodes, output_dim)

         

         # Transpose to match expected output: (batch_size, output_dim, num_nodes)

-        output = output.transpose(1, 2)

+        output = output.transpose(1, 2)  # Shape: (batch_size, output_dim, num_nodes)

         

         return output
